name: diffusion-generative-models
description: Comprehensive skill covering diffusion models, text-to-image generation (DALL-E 2, Imagen, Stable Diffusion), and text-to-video generation (Make-A-Video, Imagen Video, Phenaki). Includes DDPM/score-SDE theory, efficient sampling methods, classifier-free guidance, and architecture comparisons for modern generative AI systems.
author: rutvi
